error: AI Core kernel compilation failed because the implementation used explicit unsigned-int to float casts in kernel code when computing mean and variance denominators.
summary: Avoid explicit integer-to-float casts inside AscendC aicore functions. When a denominator such as outputVolume is needed for mean or variance, compute its reciprocal as a float in host tiling and pass that float into the kernel, then replace division by static_cast<float>(outputVolume) with multiplication by invOutputVolume.
